name: nkia-codex-skills
description: Codex skills for NKIA feature/task workflows, multi-repo auto-dev, PR/MR validation, weekly reporting, and functional TC automation.

interface.shortDescription: NKIA Linear, SonarQube, multi-repo dev, review, weekly report, and functional TC skills
interface.longDescription: Codex skills for NKIA-AI feature/task planning, task start, SonarQube quality-gate remediation, multi-repo auto-dev and auto-submit orchestration, standalone commit generation, standalone PR/MR code review, PR/MR shipping with Korean validation, post-merge finish and wrap-up workflows, evidence validation, parent feature roll-up, weekly work reporting with template-based Sheet tab creation, and generic functional TC generation/execution automation.
defaultPrompt: Use $feature to define a parent Linear feature.
Use $task to create child implementation tasks.
Use $sonarqube-pass to restore a repo SonarQube quality gate with Linear evidence.
Use $auto-submit to submit multi-repo auto-dev work.
Use $code-review to validate a GitHub PR or GitLab MR.
Use $finish after PR/MR merge to clean branches, register evidence, validate AC, and roll up Linear status.
Use $wrap-up for the Claude-compatible post-merge cleanup and evidence validation workflow.
Use $weekly to prepare the weekly report.
Use $func-tc-creator to generate functional TC markdown from Sheet/Linear/source evidence.
Use $func-tc-runner to create run config, prepare subagent prompts, and finalize live functional TC evidence.
